LanguageData.AM_FailedExperimentalSubjects.descriptio: [PAWN_nameDef] inhaled a large amount of toxic gas during a chemical plant accident .[PAWN_possessive] twin brother sent [PAWN_pronoun] to the hospital affiliated with the chemical plant to save [PAWN_pronoun], but the hospital did not treat [PAWN_nameDef]. Instead, they lied to [PAWN_possessive] family that [PAWN_pronoun] had died and used [PAWN_nameDef] as an experimental subject in a parasite experiment. This failed experiment destroyed [PAWN_possessive] mind.
LanguageData.AM_FailedExperimentalSubjects.title: failed subjects
LanguageData.AM_FashionGuy.description: After being injured,[PAWN_nameDef] was no longer able to continue [PAWN_pronoun] career as an athlete. Disappointed, [PAWN_pronoun] was hired as a security guard by a shopping mall. This fashionable guy liked to patrol the mall at night in his classic black striped sportswear and use a machine gun to knock out every sneaky thief.
LanguageData.AM_FashionGuy.title: fashion guy
LanguageData.AM_FormerAthlete.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was a former athlete. [PAWN_pronoun] had won multiple sports championships before injury.[PAWN_pronoun] had a twin brother who started working in a chemical factory during his youth, but has never heard from him since.
LanguageData.AM_FormerAthlete.title: former athlete
LanguageData.AM_LaboratoryKid.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was conceived in a test tube in a secret laboratory, where every child underwent military-style education and was frequently administered drugs. There, [PAWN_nameDef] acquired a great deal of knowledge.
LanguageData.AM_LaboratoryKid.title: laboratory kid
LanguageData.AM_ResearchersChild.description: [PAWN_nameDef]'s father was a researcher at an ancient laboratory, with an unnatural fondness for experimentation. Consequently, [PAWN_nameDef] was frequently administered unauthorized drugs, inflicting severe pain upon [PAWN_nameDef].
LanguageData.AM_ResearchersChild.title: researcher's child
LanguageData.AM_RisingStar.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a rising star in the military academy with excellent physical fitness and combat skills, which led to [PAWN_pronoun] being kidnapped and sent to a secret laboratory, where a clone was sent to [PAWN_possessive] family as a substitute.
LanguageData.AM_RisingStar.title: rising star of the military academy
LanguageData.AM_RisingStar.titleFemale: rising star of the military academy
LanguageData.AM_RunawayChild.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was frequently mistreated by [PAWN_possessive] parents, leading [PAWN_pronoun] to leave home in a fit of rage. Tragically, [PAWN_pronoun] was soon kidnapped by individuals and spirited away to a covert laboratory.
LanguageData.AM_RunawayChild.title: runaway child
LanguageData.AM_SpecialUnits.description: Following a specialized "consensual" parasite experiment, [PAWN_nameDef] was enhanced and designated as a unique unit, frequently undertaking covert missions.
LanguageData.AM_SpecialUnits.title: Special units
LanguageData.VQE_AncientEngineer01.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was part of a team attempting to reverse-engineer ancient ARC components. The mysteries behind the machine’s intricate designs fascinated [PAWN_objective]. Although much of the technology was incomprehensible, [PAWN_pronoun] successfully adapted a few critical parts for modern use.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientEngineer01.title: ancient engineer
LanguageData.VQE_ControlSystemsEngineer03.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was tasked with modernizing the control systems of ARC reactors. While [PAWN_pronoun] integrated new safety protocols, many of the core functions remained a black box. Even so, [PAWN_pronoun] managed to boost efficiency by adapting the ancient algorithms.
LanguageData.VQE_ControlSystemsEngineer03.title: control systems engineer
LanguageData.VQE_FieldRepairTech04.description: [PAWN_nameDef] spent years repairing damaged ARC units in remote colonies. Despite lacking the original schematics, [PAWN_pronoun] became adept at improvising fixes. It was a dangerous job, but [PAWN_pronoun] always carried a few spare ARC components, just in case.
LanguageData.VQE_FieldRepairTech04.title: field repair tech
LanguageData.VQE_PowerArchitect02.description: [PAWN_nameDef] specialized in optimizing the power flow within ARC systems. By carefully calibrating the fuel rods, [PAWN_pronoun] was able to significantly extend the reactor's operational time. Despite lacking full knowledge of the ancient mechanisms, [PAWN_nameDef]'s adjustments became the industry standard.
LanguageData.VQE_PowerArchitect02.title: power architect
LanguageData.VQE_SafetyInspector05.description: As a safety inspector, [PAWN_nameDef] traveled between colonies, checking the status of ARC reactors. Although [PAWN_pronoun] could only speculate about how the core systems worked, [PAWN_pronoun] was able to identify potential failures and suggest maintenance that extended reactor lifespans.
LanguageData.VQE_SafetyInspector05.title: ARC safety inspector
LanguageData.VQE_ChildhoodInventorGenetron.descriptio: As a child, [PAWN_nameDef] was never content with toys or simple amusements. [PAWN_pronoun] found joy in taking apart old machines and scraps salvaged from the colony’s scrapyard. While the other children played, [PAWN_nameDef] could be found elbows-deep in a broken generator or defunct mining drone, trying to understand what made it tick. The adults often saw this as a nuisance, especially when [PAWN_pronoun] "borrowed" essential equipment for experiments. But those who looked closer saw a spark of genius.
LanguageData.VQE_ChildhoodInventorGenetron.title: curious tinkerer
LanguageData.VQE_InventorGenetronAdulthood.descriptio: [PAWN_nameDef] became a legend among engineers as the inventor of the ARC, a groundbreaking power generator that changed the fate of entire colonies. Driven by a relentless desire to solve the energy shortages crippling the outer rim, [PAWN_pronoun] pushed the boundaries of safe experimentation. The first prototypes were rushed, leading to tragic accidents that claimed many lives. Though these failures weighed heavily on [PAWN_objective], they fueled [PAWN_possessive] determination. After countless trials, [PAWN_nameDef] finally succeeded, cementing [PAWN_possessive] legacy as a hero to some, and a reckless maverick to others.
LanguageData.VQE_InventorGenetronAdulthood.title: inventor of the ARC
LanguageData.VFEM_Archer22.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was trained to fight in the lord’s army as an archer, spending countless hours practicing [PAWN_possessive] aim. [PAWN_pronoun] became an expert at firing arrows accurately and quickly, even under pressure. LanguageData.VFEM_Steward55.description: [PAWN_nameDef] managed the estates of a noble, overseeing finances, organizing events, and ensuring the smooth operation of the household. [PAWN_pronoun] excelled in administration and diplomacy, becoming indispensable to the lord [PAWN_pronoun] served. Though proficient in intellectual and social skills, [PAWN_pronoun] saw physical labor as beneath [PAWN_objective].
LanguageData.VFEM_Steward55.title: steward
LanguageData.VFEM_StewardOfTheFields89.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was responsible for managing the agricultural production of a large estate, ensuring the fields were worked and the harvests collected. [PAWN_pronoun] developed a deep understanding of farming and organization, balancing the needs of the land with the demands of [PAWN_possessive] lord. Though skilled in rural management, [PAWN_pronoun] lacked military and courtly training.
LanguageData.VFEM_StewardOfTheFields89.title: steward of the fields
LanguageData.VFEM_Strategist65.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was a master tactician, advising lords and generals on the best paths to victory. [PAWN_pronoun] excelled at reading the battlefield, coordinating troops, and anticipating enemy moves. Though [PAWN_pronoun] rarely fought directly, [PAWN_pronoun] commanded respect for [PAWN_possessive] brilliant mind and sharp tongue.
LanguageData.VFEM_Strategist65.title: strategist
LanguageData.VFEM_UsurpersKin84.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was born into a family that seized power through treachery, earning the scorn of noble society. [PAWN_pronoun] grew up isolated and mistrusted, forced to rely on guile and intelligence to navigate the court. Though skilled in intrigue, [PAWN_pronoun] lacked the respect and alliances of legitimate noble houses.
LanguageData.VFEM_UsurpersKin84.title: usurper's kin
LanguageData.VFEM_VillageElder88.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was a respected figure in a rural community, resolving disputes and guiding decisions for the benefit of the village. [PAWN_pronoun] developed wisdom through years of leadership and experience, earning the trust of those under [PAWN_possessive] care. While [PAWN_pronoun] excelled in diplomacy, [PAWN_pronoun] left physical tasks to the younger villagers.
LanguageData.VFEM_VillageElder88.title: village elder
LanguageData.VFEM_VillagePatron95.description: [PAWN_nameDef] served as a benefactor to a local village, funding improvements to infrastructure and ensuring the well-being of [PAWN_possessive] tenants. [PAWN_pronoun] became skilled at balancing generosity with practicality, ensuring the village prospered without excessive costs. Though respected by the villagers, [PAWN_pronoun] had little experience with warfare or courtly intrigue.
LanguageData.VFEM_VillagePatron95.title: village patron
LanguageData.VFEM_WarBeastTrainer80.description: [PAWN_nameDef] trained war dogs and other beasts to fight alongside soldiers in battle. [PAWN_pronoun] specialized in teaching animals to obey commands even in the chaos of combat. Though skilled in working with animals, [PAWN_pronoun] struggled with the finer points of diplomacy and negotiation.
LanguageData.VFEM_WarBeastTrainer80.title: war beast trainer
LanguageData.VFEM_WardenOfTheNorth71.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was charged with the defense of a vast and frigid northern realm, managing both its people and its armies. [PAWN_pronoun] excelled in leadership, strategy, and building alliances to keep the lands united under [PAWN_possessive] banner. The harsh conditions forged [PAWN_pronoun] into a hardened and resolute figure.
LanguageData.VFEM_WardenOfTheNorth71.title: warden of the north
LanguageData.VFEM_ArcherTrainee155.description: [PAWN_nameDef] began training with a bow from a young age, aiming for skill and precision as required of noble warriors. [PAWN_pronoun] spent hours drawing targets in the courtyard and practicing long-distance shots. The training honed [PAWN_possessive] focus and gave [PAWN_pronoun] an edge in ranged combat.
LanguageData.VFEM_ArcherTrainee155.title: archer trainee
LanguageData.VFEM_AspiringDiplomat150.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was groomed for a future in diplomacy, studying languages, geography, and the customs of foreign courts. [PAWN_pronoun] practiced making speeches and mediating minor disputes among peers. Though still young, [PAWN_pronoun] showed promise as a skilled negotiator and tactician.
LanguageData.VFEM_AspiringDiplomat150.title: aspiring diplomat
LanguageData.VFEM_AspiringKnight145.description: [PAWN_nameDef] trained from an early age in the art of combat, preparing for the day [PAWN_pronoun] could earn [PAWN_possessive] place among the knights of [PAWN_possessive] house. [PAWN_pronoun] practiced with wooden swords and sparred with instructors, learning discipline and honor. While young, [PAWN_pronoun] already showed promise as a warrior.
LanguageData.VFEM_AspiringKnight145.title: aspiring knight
LanguageData.VFEM_BannerBearer154.description: [PAWN_nameDef] carried the family banner into drills and parades, learning to represent [PAWN_possessive] house with pride. [PAWN_pronoun] spent hours practicing marching formations and staying composed under scrutiny. Though not a frontline fighter, [PAWN_pronoun] gained valuable lessons in discipline and leadership.
LanguageData.VFEM_BannerBearer154.title: banner bearer
LanguageData.VFEM_BuddingPoet170.description: [PAWN_nameDef] composed an epic poem at a young age that spread throughout the region, earning [PAWN_pronoun] fame and admiration. Nobles and commoners alike recited [PAWN_possessive] verses, praising their vivid imagery and emotional depth. The success brought invitations to courts across the land.
LanguageData.VFEM_BuddingPoet170.title: budding poet
LanguageData.VFEM_CastleDefender153.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was raised in a fortified castle and spent [PAWN_possessive] days training with guards and learning the basics of siege defense. [PAWN_pronoun] practiced with bows on the battlements and drilled with spears in the courtyard. The life gave [PAWN_pronoun] a strong sense of duty and early combat experience.
LanguageData.VFEM_CastleDefender153.title: castle defender
LanguageData.VFEM_CastlePlaymate144.description: [PAWN_nameDef] spent [PAWN_possessive] childhood running through the halls and courtyards of a castle, playing games with other noble children. The carefree years gave [PAWN_pronoun] a strong sense of camaraderie and a basic understanding of courtly manners. However, the sheltered life left [PAWN_pronoun] naive about the struggles of common folk.
LanguageData.VFEM_CastlePlaymate144.title: castle playmate
LanguageData.VFEM_ChildOfTheEclipse162.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was born under an ominous eclipse, a sign that filled the villagers with dread. [PAWN_pronoun] grew up under the weight of grim superstition, with some believing [PAWN_pronoun] brought bad luck or worse. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to navigate the fear of others, growing cunning and detached to survive.
LanguageData.VFEM_ChildOfTheEclipse162.title: child of the eclipse
LanguageData.VFEM_CourtAttendant148.description: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up serving as a junior attendant in a royal court, learning the nuances of etiquette and the art of flattery. [PAWN_pronoun] observed the dealings of nobles and practiced [PAWN_possessive] own skills in negotiation and charm. Though immersed in the intrigue of the court, [PAWN_pronoun] rarely ventured beyond its walls.
LanguageData.VFEM_CourtAttendant148.title: court attendant
LanguageData.VFEM_EstateHeir157.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was raised on a sprawling estate, learning to oversee the household and manage the laborers who worked the land. [PAWN_pronoun] received lessons in stewardship and basic leadership, preparing [PAWN_objective] for a life of privilege. Though competent, [PAWN_pronoun] had little understanding of life beyond [PAWN_possessive] family’s wealth.
LanguageData.VFEM_EstateHeir157.title: estate heir
LanguageData.VFEM_FalconryStudent149.description: [PAWN_nameDef] spent [PAWN_possessive] youth learning the noble pastime of falconry, training birds to hunt and obey commands. [PAWN_pronoun] developed patience and a keen understanding of animal behavior. Though the skill impressed others, [PAWN_pronoun] had little time for practical tasks outside the sport.
LanguageData.VFEM_FalconryStudent149.title: falconry student
LanguageData.VFEM_GraveyardWanderer163.description: [PAWN_nameDef] spent [PAWN_possessive] days among the headstones, speaking to the dead as though they were alive. [PAWN_pronoun] was drawn to the quiet stillness and the stories carved into weathered stone. The villagers whispered of [PAWN_possessive] odd habits, and [PAWN_pronoun] learned to keep [PAWN_possessive] thoughts hidden from prying eyes.
LanguageData.VFEM_GraveyardWanderer163.title: graveyard wanderer
LanguageData.VFEM_HeirToTheEstate146.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was raised to inherit the family estate, receiving lessons in administration and diplomacy from a young age. [PAWN_pronoun] was taught to manage resources, oversee servants, and maintain order among the household. The structured upbringing prepared [PAWN_pronoun] for leadership but left little time for play.
LanguageData.VFEM_HeirToTheEstate146.title: heir to the estate
LanguageData.VFEM_LavishUpbringing158.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was surrounded by luxury from birth, never knowing hunger or hardship. [PAWN_pronoun] was taught courtly manners and spent [PAWN_possessive] days enjoying music, fine food, and leisure. While refined and confident, [PAWN_pronoun] struggled with practical tasks that required hard labor.
LanguageData.VFEM_LavishUpbringing158.title: lavish upbringing
LanguageData.VFEM_MerchantsProdigy156.description: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up surrounded by the bustling trade of [PAWN_possessive] family’s business, watching deals unfold and goods change hands. [PAWN_pronoun] was taught the art of negotiation and the importance of wealth. Though well-versed in trade, [PAWN_pronoun] had little exposure to the struggles of common life.
LanguageData.VFEM_MerchantsProdigy156.title: merchant's prodigy
LanguageData.VFEM_NobleWard141.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was sent to another noble’s court to be raised and educated in the ways of governance and etiquette. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to navigate the complexities of noble relationships and gained a basic understanding of leadership. Though surrounded by luxury, [PAWN_pronoun] spent much of [PAWN_possessive] time under watchful eyes.
LanguageData.VFEM_NobleWard141.title: noble ward
LanguageData.VFEM_Page142.description: [PAWN_nameDef] began [PAWN_possessive] training in a noble household, learning the fundamentals of serving and knightly duties. [PAWN_pronoun] spent hours cleaning armor, carrying messages, and studying basic combat techniques. The experience gave [PAWN_pronoun] an early introduction to the discipline and loyalty expected of nobility.
LanguageData.VFEM_Page142.title: page
LanguageData.VFEM_PatronOfTheArts159.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was encouraged to pursue and support the arts, attending performances and commissioning works from talented craftsmen. [PAWN_pronoun] developed an appreciation for beauty and creativity, as well as a talent for recognizing skill in others. Though cultured, [PAWN_pronoun] was sheltered from the harsher realities of life.
LanguageData.VFEM_PatronOfTheArts159.title: patron of the arts
LanguageData.VFEM_PrivilegedScholar160.description: [PAWN_nameDef] had access to the finest tutors, studying history, philosophy, and the sciences from a young age. [PAWN_pronoun] showed promise in academic pursuits, impressing [PAWN_possessive] family with [PAWN_possessive] keen intellect. However, [PAWN_pronoun] had little understanding of the struggles faced by those less fortunate.
LanguageData.VFEM_PrivilegedScholar160.title: privileged scholar
LanguageData.VFEM_PrizeArcher169.description: [PAWN_nameDef] won a prestigious archery competition at the age of thirteen, besting older and more experienced opponents. [PAWN_pronoun] was praised for [PAWN_possessive] precision and composure under pressure. The victory brought honor to [PAWN_possessive] family and set [PAWN_objective] on a path of future acclaim.
LanguageData.VFEM_PrizeArcher169.title: prize archer
LanguageData.VFEM_ProdigiousTactician167.description: [PAWN_nameDef] demonstrated a gift for strategy by organizing and winning a mock battle between the castle’s squires. [PAWN_pronoun] anticipated [PAWN_possessive] opponents’ moves and used the terrain to [PAWN_possessive] advantage, earning the admiration of seasoned knights. The event marked [PAWN_objective] as a promising future commander.
LanguageData.VFEM_ProdigiousTactician167.title: prodigious tactician
LanguageData.VFEM_ScribeInTraining147.description: [PAWN_nameDef] spent long hours learning to read and write under the guidance of a family-appointed tutor. [PAWN_pronoun] practiced copying texts and recording transactions, developing a keen eye for detail. While skilled in intellectual pursuits, [PAWN_pronoun] had little exposure to physical labor or combat training.
LanguageData.VFEM_ScribeInTraining147.title: scribe in training
LanguageData.VFEM_ShadowedOutcast161.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was feared by the villagers for reasons whispered but never explained. [PAWN_pronoun] spent [PAWN_possessive] childhood in the shadows, avoiding those who glared or crossed themselves at [PAWN_possessive] presence. The isolation hardened [PAWN_objective], leaving [PAWN_pronoun] mistrustful and quiet, always watching from the dark corners.
LanguageData.VFEM_ShadowedOutcast161.title: shadowed outcast
LanguageData.VFEM_ShieldCarrier152.description: [PAWN_nameDef] trained alongside warriors, serving as a shield carrier during skirmishes and drills. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to endure long marches and protect [PAWN_possessive] mentors in the heat of battle. Though young, [PAWN_pronoun] displayed courage and determination beyond [PAWN_possessive] years.
LanguageData.VFEM_ShieldCarrier152.title: shield carrier
LanguageData.VFEM_Squire151.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was apprenticed to a knight, tasked with maintaining armor, tending horses, and learning the code of chivalry. [PAWN_pronoun] spent countless hours observing battles and practicing with training weapons. The rigorous training instilled discipline and a desire to prove [PAWN_possessive] worth on the battlefield.
LanguageData.VFEM_Squire151.title: squire
LanguageData.VFEM_VillageCurseBearer164.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was believed to be cursed, blamed for every ill fortune that befell the village. Crops failed, livestock died, and villagers fell ill, all under [PAWN_possessive] dark shadow. [PAWN_pronoun] grew to expect rejection, developing a cold resilience to survive in a world that feared [PAWN_objective].
LanguageData.VFEM_VillageCurseBearer164.title: village curse-bearer
LanguageData.VFEM_WhisperedFoundling165.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was discovered as an infant at the edge of the woods, wrapped in tattered cloth and left in the rain. The villagers took [PAWN_objective] in reluctantly, always murmuring of unnatural origins. [PAWN_pronoun] grew up in the shadow of suspicion, learning to remain unseen and unheard.
LanguageData.VFEM_WhisperedFoundling165.title: whispered foundling
LanguageData.VFEM_YoungArchitect168.description: [PAWN_nameDef] designed an innovative irrigation system for the family estate at just ten years old, greatly increasing crop yields. [PAWN_pronoun] impressed both the stewards and laborers with [PAWN_possessive] ingenuity. The success ensured [PAWN_pronoun] would be taken seriously, even at such a young age.
LanguageData.VFEM_YoungArchitect168.title: young architect
LanguageData.VFEM_YoungDiplomat166.description: [PAWN_nameDef] surprised [PAWN_possessive] elders by brokering a truce between feuding noble families at just twelve years old. [PAWN_pronoun] used charm and logic to persuade both sides, earning respect far beyond [PAWN_possessive] years. The experience cemented [PAWN_possessive] place as a rising star in courtly politics.
LanguageData.VFEM_YoungDiplomat166.title: young diplomat
LanguageData.VFEM_YoungScholar143.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was tutored in history, philosophy, and mathematics from an early age, as was expected of highborn children. [PAWN_pronoun] showed a natural curiosity and an aptitude for learning, earning praise from [PAWN_possessive] tutors. Though well-read, [PAWN_pronoun] had little experience with manual or practical work.
LanguageData.VFEM_YoungScholar143.title: young scholar
LanguageData.VQE_ChildhoodLegendaryBlacksmith.descrip: Born beneath the towering chimneys of the Grand Forge, [PAWN_nameDef] grew up with fire and steel as [PAWN_possessive] only companions. While others played, [PAWN_pronoun] watched the master smiths shape metal into weapons of legend. By the time [PAWN_pronoun] could walk, [PAWN_pronoun] had learned the weight of a hammer. By the time [PAWN_pronoun] could read, [PAWN_pronoun] had memorized the blueprints of masterwork armor. Elders whispered that [PAWN_nameDef] was destined to craft wonders beyond imagination, a future shaped by the ringing of steel on anvil.
LanguageData.VQE_ChildhoodLegendaryBlacksmith.title: child of the forge
LanguageData.VQE_LegendaryBlacksmithAdulthood.descrip: [PAWN_nameDef] was the last of [PAWN_possessive] kind, the final master of an art lost to time. In a world where steel had become obsolete, [PAWN_pronoun] forged weapons that could cut through plasteel and armor that could withstand railgun fire. Every strike of [PAWN_possessive] hammer wrote history in tempered alloys, cryptofused plating, and weapons that defied physics itself. But when [PAWN_possessive] ship fell, the forges cooled and the secrets of the craft faded into legend. Now, wandering among the ruins of [PAWN_possessive] past, [PAWN_pronoun] carries the weight of a lost age, the guilt of being the last one.
LanguageData.VQE_LegendaryBlacksmithAdulthood.title: legendary blacksmith
LanguageData.VQE_AshStrategist40.description: [PAWN_nameDef] formulated long-term battle plans relying on the deployment of expendable, undead battalions into irradiated and cursed zones. [PAWN_pronoun] viewed humans as inefficient vessels, preferring dust-born constructs who didn’t sleep or retreat. [PAWN_pronoun] once approved a maneuver where only the dead returned and called it a flawless victory.
LanguageData.VQE_AshStrategist40.title: ash strategist
LanguageData.VQE_AshTranslator15.description: [PAWN_nameDef] analyzed the patterns left in deadlife dust as it settled, fractals of intent, echoing through silence. [PAWN_pronoun] claimed the dust was speaking, and spent hours tracing messages only [PAWN_pronoun] could see. The others stopped questioning it when [PAWN_pronoun] predicted a breach twelve hours before it happened.
LanguageData.VQE_AshTranslator15.title: ash translator
LanguageData.VQE_BreachVolunteer46.description: [PAWN_nameDef] stepped forward during the first breach trials, signing a form titled "Consent to Dissolution." [PAWN_pronoun] was marched into the dust storm without armor, carrying only a black flag. Days later, the flag returned, stitched into [PAWN_possessive] new uniform.
LanguageData.VQE_BreachVolunteer46.title: breach volunteer
LanguageData.VQE_ComplianceAuditor30.description: [PAWN_nameDef] reviewed personnel logs, behavioral reports, and incident transcripts, flagging deviations for reconditioning. [PAWN_pronoun] never met the people [PAWN_pronoun] condemned. Only once did [PAWN_pronoun] hesitate - when the file bore [PAWN_possessive] own name.
LanguageData.VQE_ComplianceAuditor30.title: compliance auditor
LanguageData.VQE_CompliantHusk10.description: [PAWN_nameDef] volunteered for cognitive stripping, which included the removal of memory, name, and will. What remained was a body that obeyed. [PAWN_pronoun] stood in formation while storms raged and flesh fell from bone, waiting only for the next command pulse from the central stack.
LanguageData.VQE_CompliantHusk10.title: compliant husk
LanguageData.VQE_CorridorWatch25.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was posted in a hallway that no one walked down, outside a door that no one opened. [PAWN_pronoun] was told to stand still, never speak, and never blink too long. On the seventh year, [PAWN_pronoun] started to hear footsteps behind the wall.
LanguageData.VQE_CorridorWatch25.title: corridor watch
LanguageData.VQE_CrateNotator32.description: [PAWN_nameDef] scrawled codes onto crates, noting date, contents, and threat tier. Many containers arrived unmarked, but [PAWN_pronoun] learned quickly: if it rattled, it was best to skip the contents line. Sometimes the ink bled upward, off the label, and into [PAWN_possessive] sleeve.
LanguageData.VQE_CrateNotator32.title: crate notator
LanguageData.VQE_DockGunner19.description: [PAWN_nameDef] manned the auto-cannons near the dust transfer docks, defending against "anomalous discharge movement", whatever that meant. Nothing ever approached the dock, but [PAWN_pronoun] fired anyway. Better that than let the dust think [PAWN_pronoun] hesitated.
LanguageData.VQE_DockGunner19.title: dock gunner
LanguageData.VQE_DoctrineScribe27.description: [PAWN_nameDef] transcribed the daily decrees of the central authority, etching them onto rusted tablets distributed throughout the facility. [PAWN_pronoun] wrote in total silence, copying phrases [PAWN_pronoun] did not understand. One phrase, however, appeared in every order: "Decay is compliance."
LanguageData.VQE_DoctrineScribe27.title: doctrine scribe
LanguageData.VQE_DoorTechnician14.description: [PAWN_nameDef] operated the containment pylons and extraction rigs around the Death Door. [PAWN_pronoun] calibrated siphons by eye and rebalanced psychic insulators mid-flow. The margin for error was one breath, and [PAWN_pronoun] hasn’t taken a full one since.
LanguageData.VQE_DoorTechnician14.title: door technician
LanguageData.VQE_DustCourier12.description: [PAWN_nameDef] ferried containers of deadlife dust from the extraction chamber to cold-vault containment zones. Escorts were forbidden, as too much movement stirred the dust. [PAWN_pronoun] walked in silence, clutching steel boxes that sometimes wept from within.
LanguageData.VQE_DustCourier12.title: dust courier
LanguageData.VQE_DustDoctrineArchitect36.description: [PAWN_nameDef] authored the central philosophy behind the use of deadlife dust, an ideology blending utility, inevitability, and transcendence through decay. [PAWN_pronoun] designed the program not to conquer death, but to industrialize it. Those who dissented were reassigned to dust-harvesting duties until compliant.
LanguageData.VQE_DustDoctrineArchitect36.title: dust doctrine architect
LanguageData.VQE_DustLoader16.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was responsible for loading raw deadlife dust into containment drums, working under flashing hazard lights and sealed hoods. The powder stuck to gloves and skin no matter how thick the gear. [PAWN_pronoun] was told it couldn't penetrate bone, but [PAWN_pronoun] isn’t sure anymore.
LanguageData.VQE_DustLoader16.title: dust loader
LanguageData.VQE_DustRegistrar26.description: [PAWN_nameDef] catalogued every gram of deadlife dust processed through the sector, logging each shipment’s origin and intended experiment. [PAWN_pronoun] never asked what the dust did, just that the weights matched and the signatures were clean. Some days, the logbook filled itself.
LanguageData.VQE_DustRegistrar26.title: dust registrar
LanguageData.VQE_EchoRepeater45.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was exposed to the Death Door during a containment breach and hasn't spoken [PAWN_possessive] own thoughts since. Everything [PAWN_pronoun] says is a repetition of something someone else is about to say. [PAWN_pronoun] knows things that haven’t happened yet. The facility keeps [PAWN_objective] alive... just in case.
LanguageData.VQE_EchoRepeater45.title: echo repeater
LanguageData.VQE_EternalLogisticsOfficer38.descriptio: [PAWN_nameDef] designed the warehouse and storage rotation protocol meant to function without human oversight for over a thousand years. [PAWN_pronoun] believed a perfect system outlived its masters, and had [PAWN_possessive] own heart replaced with a synthetic failsafe. [PAWN_pronoun] has not aged since activation.
LanguageData.VQE_EternalLogisticsOfficer38.title: eternal logistics officer
LanguageData.VQE_FilterMechanic20.description: [PAWN_nameDef] maintained the dust filtration systems that kept the air breathable and the death sealed. The filters clogged fast, screaming if left too long. [PAWN_pronoun] replaced them by hand, gloved, double-suited, and breathing recycled air laced with static.
LanguageData.VQE_FilterMechanic20.title: filter mechanic
LanguageData.VQE_FoglineObserver8.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was deployed alone into chemically saturated deadzones, tasked with recording troop decay rates and atmospheric effects. [PAWN_pronoun] watched comrades dissolve, regenerate, and march again, then noted the results with unblinking precision. [PAWN_pronoun] didn’t speak for years afterward, and no one asked [PAWN_objective] to.
LanguageData.VQE_FoglineObserver8.title: fogline observer
LanguageData.VQE_GatewaySentinel13.description: [PAWN_nameDef] guarded the perimeter of the Death Door facility, tasked with eliminating anything that emerged or tried to return. [PAWN_pronoun] saw shapes that didn’t reflect light, and heard commands that weren’t broadcast. The dust drifted past the line sometimes, and [PAWN_pronoun] learned not to breathe too deep.
LanguageData.VQE_GatewaySentinel13.title: gateway sentinel
LanguageData.VQE_IndoctrinatedRevenant5.description: [PAWN_nameDef] died in the field and was immediately reanimated under Directive Pale Flame: an experimental loop-binding protocol to override memory, identity, and morality. [PAWN_pronoun] still wears the scars of [PAWN_possessive] first death, though they’ve long ceased to matter. Now, [PAWN_pronoun] kills with the calm of someone who’s already passed judgment.
LanguageData.VQE_IndoctrinatedRevenant5.title: indoctrinated revenant
LanguageData.VQE_IntakeMonitor18.description: [PAWN_nameDef] watched the flow of deadlife dust into containment silos, reporting clogs and pressure drops with precise timing. [PAWN_pronoun] wasn’t allowed to speak to other staff as too many went missing between shifts. The job required focus and silence, which [PAWN_pronoun] delivered perfectly.
LanguageData.VQE_IntakeMonitor18.title: intake monitor
LanguageData.VQE_LabelOverseer34.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was in charge of verifying label integrity across the sealed vault grid. [PAWN_pronoun] spent entire shifts reading faded text under flickering lights, checking against catalogs no longer maintained. Some crates had no labels, just symbols that [PAWN_pronoun] could swear [PAWN_pronoun] remembered from dreams.
LanguageData.VQE_LabelOverseer34.title: label overseer
LanguageData.VQE_MealDistributor24.description: [PAWN_nameDef] handed out ration packs to workers exiting the sealed extraction halls. The meals were identical, grey, tasteless, pre-labeled. Sometimes one would whisper when opened. [PAWN_pronoun] never took one for [PAWN_objective]self, just in case.
LanguageData.VQE_MealDistributor24.title: meal distributor
LanguageData.VQE_Necroengineer3.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was both soldier and scientist, one of the few entrusted to maintain the resurrection architecture embedded in elite corpses. [PAWN_pronoun] spliced code into spinal columns and rewrote death like it was faulty circuitry. Despite the grotesque procedures, [PAWN_pronoun] never hesitated, as progress demanded flesh.
LanguageData.VQE_Necroengineer3.title: necroengineer
LanguageData.VQE_NullInfantry7.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was among the first inducted into the Null Corps: frontline troops chemically lobotomized to erase fear and memory. [PAWN_pronoun] received orders through skull-implanted transceivers, moving silently and without question. [PAWN_pronoun] does not remember pain, or why [PAWN_pronoun] enlisted. Only the rifle in [PAWN_possessive] hands.
LanguageData.VQE_NullInfantry7.title: null infantry
LanguageData.VQE_NullWitness44.description: No records exist for [PAWN_nameDef] prior to Vault Cycle 18. [PAWN_pronoun] was found kneeling at the Death Door, eyes closed, hands outstretched, murmuring patterns that canceled sound in a six-meter radius. [PAWN_pronoun] now works in Inventory. The lights dim when [PAWN_pronoun] passes.
LanguageData.VQE_NullWitness44.title: null witness
LanguageData.VQE_NutritionSynthesist29.description: [PAWN_nameDef] formulated nutrient slurries for long-term storage in deep dormancy wings. [PAWN_pronoun] was told not to question the smell, or why some vats emptied without record. [PAWN_pronoun] just stirred, sealed, and labeled each batch: “For Contingency Use Only.”
LanguageData.VQE_NutritionSynthesist29.title: nutrition synthesist
LanguageData.VQE_ObediencePledge48.description: [PAWN_nameDef] signed the Oath of Obedience in blood, requesting permanent reassignment to non-cognitive labor. [PAWN_pronoun] underwent cerebral smoothing, then was sent to carry crates too heavy for the living. [PAWN_pronoun] does not stop until ordered to, even if bones crack.
LanguageData.VQE_ObediencePledge48.title: obedience pledge
LanguageData.VQE_OssuaryGuard9.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was stationed in the ossuaries: vast chambers where failed soldiers were stacked and catalogued for parts. [PAWN_pronoun] patrolled in silence, rifle in hand, surrounded by the rattling echoes of half-living experiments. No one spoke in the ossuaries. No one had mouths.
LanguageData.VQE_OssuaryGuard9.title: ossuary guard
LanguageData.VQE_PaleWitness43.description: [PAWN_nameDef] stood guard outside the inner chamber for 900 days, never entering, never relieved. Then, on day 901, the door opened just a slit. [PAWN_pronoun] looked inside for exactly three seconds. Since then, [PAWN_pronoun] has not blinked once.
LanguageData.VQE_PaleWitness43.title: pale witness
LanguageData.VQE_PreservedCommander4.description: [PAWN_nameDef] rose to command a death battalion before being sealed in cryostorage with [PAWN_possessive] mind uploaded to carbon-thin neural plates. Decades passed in blackout stasis, dreaming only of tactical formations and absolute obedience. When awakened, [PAWN_pronoun] resumed command as if the war had never paused.
LanguageData.VQE_PreservedCommander4.title: preserved commander
LanguageData.VQE_ProcessedSentinel50.description: [PAWN_nameDef] requested the “watcher’s gift” - a surgical splice of deadlife dust into the optic nerves and frontal cortex. [PAWN_pronoun] stands motionless for days, monitoring movement where none exists. [PAWN_pronoun] hasn’t reported an intrusion, but occasionally whispers that one is "already inside."
LanguageData.VQE_ProcessedSentinel50.title: processed sentinel
LanguageData.VQE_PrototypeSubject1.description: [PAWN_nameDef] volunteered for the first wave of transhuman necrosis trials, offering [PAWN_possessive] body to a military doctrine that worshipped permanence through decay. [PAWN_pronoun] endured months in a sealed vat as bone, tissue, and cognition were rewired by machine and fluid alike. What emerged was no longer fully alive, but unshakably loyal.
LanguageData.VQE_PrototypeSubject1.title: prototype subject
LanguageData.VQE_ReanimationWarden39.description: [PAWN_nameDef] oversaw the barracks of the reanimated units, managing deployment cycles and overseeing mental degradation thresholds. [PAWN_pronoun] insisted the undead required no names, only barcodes. When one subject regained a memory and spoke, [PAWN_pronoun] personally incinerated it.
LanguageData.VQE_ReanimationWarden39.title: reanimation warden
LanguageData.VQE_ReturnedObserver42.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was sent through the Death Door for a three-minute reconnaissance. The cameras failed instantly. [PAWN_pronoun] returned eighteen hours later, unharmed but altered, with skin colder, voice slower, eyes not entirely [PAWN_possessive]. No one asked what [PAWN_pronoun] saw. No one does now.
LanguageData.VQE_ReturnedObserver42.title: returned observer
LanguageData.VQE_RitualSubject47.description: [PAWN_nameDef] knelt willingly in the circle, surrounded by augurs and dark machines, and did not scream when the dust was poured into [PAWN_possessive] lungs. [PAWN_pronoun] was declared clinically dead, then reassigned to frontline duty two hours later. [PAWN_pronoun] no longer blinks. Nor stops.
LanguageData.VQE_RitualSubject47.title: ritual subject
LanguageData.VQE_ShiftRecorder23.description: [PAWN_nameDef] logged every shift rotation, personnel movement, and anomaly ping near the Death Door. [PAWN_pronoun] noticed strange patterns in the logs: repeating names, people clocking in after confirmed deaths, whole hours missing. [PAWN_pronoun] kept recording anyway.
LanguageData.VQE_ShiftRecorder23.title: shift recorder
LanguageData.VQE_SilenceOfficer21.description: [PAWN_nameDef] enforced silence protocol within the dust-processing halls, where sound was said to attract unwanted responses. [PAWN_pronoun] walked the catwalks with a shock-rod and a clicker, punishing speech, coughs and even breath, if too loud. [PAWN_pronoun] hasn’t spoken in years, even off duty.
LanguageData.VQE_SilenceOfficer21.title: silence officer
LanguageData.VQE_SilentConversion49.description: [PAWN_nameDef] walked into the conversion chamber, sealed the door behind [PAWN_objective], and waited. The machine inside removed [PAWN_possessive] speech, hunger, and memory. What emerged walked straight to duty assignment without waiting for instruction.
LanguageData.VQE_SilentConversion49.title: silent conversion
LanguageData.VQE_SpecimenHandler28.description: [PAWN_nameDef] moved biological containers between crypto-labs, some twitching, some whispering. [PAWN_pronoun] never opened a crate, but sometimes the shadows inside moved with familiarity. [PAWN_pronoun] didn’t log what didn’t stop moving.
LanguageData.VQE_SpecimenHandler28.title: specimen handler
LanguageData.VQE_StockpileRotator33.description: [PAWN_nameDef] moved ancient supplies through decaying aisles, rotating materials to slow entropy. Many of the items had no known purpose, some no discernible shape. [PAWN_pronoun] once touched something warm that shouldn’t have been. It didn’t cool down afterward.
LanguageData.VQE_StockpileRotator33.title: stockpile rotator
LanguageData.VQE_ThresholdHarvester11.description: [PAWN_nameDef] stood closest to the Death Door, siphoning dust from its breathless aperture into sealed black vials. The dust hissed, shimmered, and whispered, burning the air and minds alike. [PAWN_pronoun] wore triple-layered filtration gear, but still wakes to coughing shadows.
LanguageData.VQE_ThresholdHarvester11.title: threshold harvester
LanguageData.VQE_TrenchAwakener6.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was assigned to burial patrols, recovering fallen comrades and tagging them for reanimation. [PAWN_pronoun] slept among corpses, carried bone-thin bodies back to processing, and watched them twitch to life again. The stench never faded, but neither did [PAWN_possessive] unwavering obedience.
LanguageData.VQE_TrenchAwakener6.title: trench awakener
LanguageData.VQE_UniformInspector22.description: [PAWN_nameDef] checked for dust contamination in uniforms and skin before workers left the core sectors. [PAWN_pronoun] scrubbed patches that pulsed, burned fabric that moved, and blacklisted anything that remembered touch. [PAWN_pronoun] stopped questioning why some suits came back... without the wearers.
LanguageData.VQE_UniformInspector22.title: uniform inspector
LanguageData.VQE_VaultArchivist31.description: [PAWN_nameDef] maintained ledgers of inventory buried deep in the sub-storage vaults. [PAWN_pronoun] documented sealed containers with unreadable glyphs and crates that hummed faintly when touched. One morning, an entry appeared in [PAWN_possessive] own handwriting, describing a box [PAWN_pronoun] hadn’t logged yet.
LanguageData.VQE_VaultArchivist31.title: vault archivist
LanguageData.VQE_VaultCommissar37.description: [PAWN_nameDef] ensured ideological purity among vault personnel, conducting loyalty evaluations and sanctioning disciplinary corrections. [PAWN_pronoun] maintained that those exposed to the Death Door too long became unreliable. [PAWN_pronoun] had many of them sealed behind the vaults, alive or not was irrelevant.
LanguageData.VQE_VaultCommissar37.title: vault commissar
LanguageData.VQE_VaultEnforcer2.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was stationed deep beneath the surface, tasked with protecting the bio-vaults that housed experimental regeneration tanks and failed prototypes. When containment alarms sounded, [PAWN_pronoun] didn’t flinch. The only thing [PAWN_pronoun] feared was failure, and fear had been surgically removed years ago.
LanguageData.VQE_VaultEnforcer2.title: vault enforcer
LanguageData.VQE_VaultEntryClerk35.description: [PAWN_nameDef] verified access credentials for vault entrants and logged removals from sealed shelves. [PAWN_pronoun] noticed that names on the log began to repeat: dead soldiers requesting supplies long after they’d been archived. [PAWN_pronoun] flagged it once. Nothing changed.
LanguageData.VQE_VaultEntryClerk35.title: vault entry clerk
LanguageData.VQE_VaultScrubber17.description: [PAWN_nameDef] cleaned the insides of sealed dust vaults after they were purged. The walls were never truly clean, they were always humming, always whispering. [PAWN_pronoun] stopped using [PAWN_possessive] name after the third cycle. No one corrected [PAWN_objective].
LanguageData.VQE_VaultScrubber17.title: vault scrubber
LanguageData.VQE_WhisperHost41.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was assigned to monitor the auditory pulses emitted by the Death Door during lunar shifts. [PAWN_pronoun] began transcribing messages in no known language, yet perfectly understood. After the seventh day, [PAWN_pronoun] no longer required equipment to hear them.
LanguageData.VQE_WhisperHost41.title: whisper host
LanguageData.VQE_Childhood_OfficersShadow.description: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up behind reinforced glass, just beyond the war room where [PAWN_possessive] parent issued silent commands to a dying world. The halls were sterile, the uniforms always grey, and [PAWN_pronoun] quickly learned which doors never opened and which ones never closed. [PAWN_pronoun] was told the flickering silhouettes beyond the viewing screens were simulations, until one of them looked back. No one mentioned it afterward, and neither did [PAWN_pronoun].
LanguageData.VQE_Childhood_OfficersShadow.title: officer’s shadow
LanguageData.VQE_TheGeneral.description: [PAWN_nameDef] designed Operation: Deadlife from the first blueprint to the last breath, believing death could be structured, harnessed, and weaponized. When the Death Door was first opened, [PAWN_pronoun] stepped through without hesitation, alone, unarmed, and smiling. [PAWN_pronoun] returned days later, silent and burned from within, wrapped in binding cloth and sealed inside a containment sarcophagus that no one claimed to understand. The war ended. The door remained open. [PAWN_pronoun] sleeps still - but the seals are growing warm.
LanguageData.VQE_TheGeneral.title: the general
LanguageData.VQE_ArchiteVolunteer1.description: [PAWN_nameDef] enlisted in a secret military program that promised glory and strength. The experiments left [PAWN_objective] tougher than most, but the treatments damaged [PAWN_possessive] fine motor skills and stability.
LanguageData.VQE_ArchiteVolunteer1.title: archite volunteer
LanguageData.VQE_BetrayalStudy21.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was forced into experiments where subjects were paired as close companions, only to be tricked into betraying one another for survival. The cruelty broke [PAWN_possessive] ability to trust, but sharpened [PAWN_possessive] instincts for danger.
LanguageData.VQE_BetrayalStudy21.title: betrayal study
LanguageData.VQE_BoneReforged6.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was subjected to a brutal trial where every bone in [PAWN_possessive] body was shattered, replaced, and rebuilt with reinforced grafts. The process left [PAWN_objective] nearly unbreakable, but the constant agony scarred [PAWN_possessive] mind forever.
LanguageData.VQE_BoneReforged6.title: bone reforged
LanguageData.VQE_BrainProbed8.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was part of a horrific program where archite nodes were drilled directly into [PAWN_possessive] brain. The procedures heightened reflexes and memory recall, but frequent blackouts and haunting visions still plague [PAWN_objective].
LanguageData.VQE_BrainProbed8.title: brain probed
LanguageData.VQE_CombatDrills15.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was forced through punishing combat drills meant to test the breaking point of soldiers under fire. The brutal regimen honed [PAWN_possessive] instincts, but left [PAWN_objective] with lingering injuries and a deep mistrust of authority.
LanguageData.VQE_CombatDrills15.title: combat drill subject
LanguageData.VQE_CompassionPunished24.description: [PAWN_nameDef] lived through trials where showing kindness meant punishment, while cruelty was rewarded. Over time, [PAWN_pronoun] learned to hide compassion behind a mask of cold obedience, though the instinct to care never fully left.
LanguageData.VQE_CompassionPunished24.title: compassion punished
LanguageData.VQE_DeceptionStudy16.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was placed in a program that rewarded lying and punished honesty. Over time, [PAWN_pronoun] became skilled at reading people, but found it difficult to form genuine connections.
LanguageData.VQE_DeceptionStudy16.title: deception study
LanguageData.VQE_EnhancedSoldier5.description: [PAWN_nameDef] became part of a military program to create supersoldiers through archite injections. The procedures hardened [PAWN_objective] for combat, but the constant modifications dulled [PAWN_possessive] sense of self and left [PAWN_objective] detached from ordinary life.
LanguageData.VQE_EnhancedSoldier5.title: enhanced soldier
LanguageData.VQE_EyeReplaced10.description: [PAWN_nameDef] had both eyes removed and replaced with unstable experimental augments, meant to track targets in darkness. The implants improved [PAWN_possessive] aim, but left [PAWN_objective] sensitive to light and forever reliant on strange visual overlays.
LanguageData.VQE_EyeReplaced10.title: eye replaced
LanguageData.VQE_FalseFamily22.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was placed into simulated households with strangers acting as kin, only to have them vanish without explanation. This cycle repeated until [PAWN_pronoun] stopped forming bonds at all, surviving instead through cold detachment.
LanguageData.VQE_FalseFamily22.title: false family
LanguageData.VQE_GeneFighter3.description: Chosen for a military experiment, [PAWN_nameDef] underwent forced genetic alterations meant to create stronger soldiers. The project gave [PAWN_objective] an edge in battle, but the constant tests left little time for education or civilian skills.
LanguageData.VQE_GeneFighter3.title: gene fighter
LanguageData.VQE_GroupConflict17.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was locked in rooms with other subjects while researchers manipulated resources to force conflict. The constant fighting sharpened [PAWN_possessive] survival instincts, but trust became impossible.
LanguageData.VQE_GroupConflict17.title: conflict subject
LanguageData.VQE_IsolationChamber14.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was kept alone in a silent, lightless cell for months while researchers studied the effects of sensory deprivation. The ordeal left [PAWN_objective] distant and withdrawn, but strangely focused when working alone.
LanguageData.VQE_IsolationChamber14.title: isolation chamber
LanguageData.VQE_IsolationTest19.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was forced into false social situations where allies would suddenly vanish or betray them. The shifting rules left [PAWN_objective] paranoid, but keenly aware of small details others overlook.
LanguageData.VQE_IsolationTest19.title: isolation test
LanguageData.VQE_LossExperiment20.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was made to form bonds with fellow subjects, only to watch them be taken away again and again. The grief left scars, but also gave [PAWN_objective] an unusual resilience to despair.
LanguageData.VQE_LossExperiment20.title: loss experiment
LanguageData.VQE_MilitaryExperiment4.description: [PAWN_nameDef] volunteered for classified experiments, believing it was [PAWN_possessive] duty. Enhanced reflexes and stronger muscles were the results — but at the cost of chronic pain and a short temper.
LanguageData.VQE_MilitaryExperiment4.title: military experiment
LanguageData.VQE_MuscleStitched9.description: [PAWN_nameDef] endured endless cycles of muscle excision and forced regrowth, each time restitched into denser configurations. The outcome was immense strength, but [PAWN_possessive] body remains grotesquely uneven and constantly aches from the strain.
LanguageData.VQE_MuscleStitched9.title: muscle stitched
LanguageData.VQE_ObedienceTrial18.description: [PAWN_nameDef] spent years in a program designed to test the limits of obedience to authority. Following orders became second nature, but [PAWN_objective] never learned to make decisions for [PAWN_objective]self.
LanguageData.VQE_ObedienceTrial18.title: obedience trial
LanguageData.VQE_PainTolerance13.description: [PAWN_nameDef] endured endless procedures designed to push the limits of human pain tolerance. Though the agony left [PAWN_objective] hardened, [PAWN_pronoun] never truly recovered [PAWN_possessive] sense of trust in others.
LanguageData.VQE_PainTolerance13.title: pain tolerance trial
LanguageData.VQE_SilenceStudy25.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was raised in enforced silence, punished for speaking or even making noise. The isolation left [PAWN_objective] almost mute in groups, but gave [PAWN_possessive] an uncanny focus when working alone.
LanguageData.VQE_SilenceStudy25.title: silence study
LanguageData.VQE_SkinGrafted7.description: [PAWN_nameDef] underwent repeated skin-flaying and regenerative grafting, designed to test rapid healing serums. The experiments made [PAWN_objective] resistant to injury, but also dulled [PAWN_possessive] sense of touch and left [PAWN_possessive] body covered in scars.
LanguageData.VQE_SkinGrafted7.title: skin grafted
LanguageData.VQE_StarvationTrial23.description: [PAWN_nameDef] endured experiments where food was withheld and rations were deliberately uneven, forcing subjects to beg or fight for scraps. Hunger carved deep scars into [PAWN_possessive] mind, leaving [PAWN_objective] restless and distrustful of generosity.
LanguageData.VQE_StarvationTrial23.title: starvation trial
LanguageData.VQE_StressTest11.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was confined for weeks in controlled conditions, deprived of sleep and overloaded with sensory input to measure endurance. The tests broke [PAWN_possessive] nerves, leaving [PAWN_objective] twitchy but strangely resistant to stress.
LanguageData.VQE_StressTest11.title: stress test subject
LanguageData.VQE_ToxicExposure12.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was sealed in chambers filled with toxic vapors as part of a military resilience program. The experience scarred [PAWN_possessive] lungs and burned [PAWN_possessive] skin, but [PAWN_pronoun] learned to push through sickness and pain.
LanguageData.VQE_ToxicExposure12.title: toxic exposure
LanguageData.VQE_TrialSubject2.description: [PAWN_nameDef] signed away [PAWN_possessive] rights for a chance to join an experimental unit. Endless injections and training made [PAWN_objective] resilient, but constant observation and confinement left [PAWN_objective] anxious and withdrawn.
LanguageData.VQE_TrialSubject2.title: trial subject
LanguageData.VQE_IdealPatient.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was chosen for countless experimental procedures with archite technology. For reasons unknown, [PAWN_pronoun] never rejected an implant, making [PAWN_objective] the perfect subject for radical genetic experiments. The treatments left [PAWN_objective] frail in body, but adapted to pain and unusually tolerant of hardship. Sadly, one of the treatments has resulted in a slowly progressing terminal illness.
LanguageData.VQE_IdealPatient.title: ideal patient
LanguageData.VQE_KidnappedChild.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was abducted at a young age and raised in captivity. Deprived of proper schooling, [PAWN_pronoun] survived by learning to listen, to obey, and to read the moods of [PAWN_possessive] captors. The experience left [PAWN_objective] wary of others and untrained in most practical skills, but unusually sensitive to people’s intentions.
LanguageData.VQE_KidnappedChild.title: kidnapped child
